case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SERGIO ALEXANDER IZAGUIRRE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SERGIO ALEXANDER IZAGUIRRE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IZAGUIRRE, SERGIO ALEXANDER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,755.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
